patterns.pattern: Pydantic v2 does not accept required=True in Field(). Fields without defaults are required by default.

When dynamically changing model_config['extra'] on Pydantic v2 models, you must rebuild ALL subclasses twice: first pass compiles core schemas, second pass ensures cross-references between subclasses pick up final schemas.
This repo enforces 100-char line limit via pylint in Bazel. json_schema_extra dicts often need multi-line formatting.
Pydantic v1 Field(const=True, default='value') becomes Literal['value'] type annotation in v2.
Pydantic v1 @validator becomes @field_validator in v2. @root_validator becomes @model_validator.
Pydantic v1 schema_extra in Config class becomes json_schema_extra in Field() or model_config in v2.
